'''√l-sh-sh''' ('''lashasha''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:dwale|dwale]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-sh-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:dwale|dwale]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| √l-sh-sh
|-
! Lemma
| lashasha
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:lashashithi|lashashithi]] || [[word:lashashiji|lashashiji]] || [[word:lashashishi|lashashishi]] || [[word:lashashi|lashashi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:lashashuthuth|lashashuthuth]] || [[word:lashashujuj|lashashujuj]] || [[word:lashashushush|lashashushush]] || [[word:lashash|lashash]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:lashashuthu|lashashuthu]] || [[word:lashashuju|lashashuju]] || [[word:lashashushu|lashashushu]] || [[word:lashashu|lashashu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:lashashufuth|lashashufuth]] || [[word:lashashufuj|lashashufuj]] || [[word:lashashufush|lashashufush]] || [[word:lashashuf|lashashuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:lashashethe|lashashethe]] || [[word:lashasheje|lashasheje]] || [[word:lashasheshe|lashasheshe]] || [[word:lashashe|lashashe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:lashashothoth|lashashothoth]] || [[word:lashashojoj|lashashojoj]] || [[word:lashashoshosh|lashashoshosh]] || [[word:lashash|lashash]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:lashashotho|lashashotho]] || [[word:lashashojo|lashashojo]] || [[word:lashashosho|lashashosho]] || [[word:lashasho|lashasho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:lashashofoth|lashashofoth]] || [[word:lashashofoj|lashashofoj]] || [[word:lashashofosh|lashashofosh]] || [[word:lashashof|lashashof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:lashashïf|lashashïf]] || [[word:lashashïf|lashashïf]] || [[word:lashashïf|lashashïf]] || [[word:lashashïf|lashashïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:lashashïfïf|lashashïfïf]] || [[word:lashashïfïf|lashashïfïf]] || [[word:lashashïfïf|lashashïfïf]] || [[word:lashashïfïf|lashashïfïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:lashashïf|lashashïf]] || [[word:lashashïf|lashashïf]] || [[word:lashashïf|lashashïf]] || [[word:lashashïf|lashashïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:lashashïf|lashashïf]] || [[word:lashashïf|lashashïf]] || [[word:lashashïf|lashashïf]] || [[word:lashashïf|lashashïf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:lashashæthæ|lashashæthæ]] || [[word:lashashæjæ|lashashæjæ]] || [[word:lashashæshæ|lashashæshæ]] || [[word:lashashæ|lashashæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:lashashathath|lashashathath]] || [[word:lashashajaj|lashashajaj]] || [[word:lashashashash|lashashashash]] || [[word:lashash|lashash]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:lashashatha|lashashatha]] || [[word:lashashaja|lashashaja]] || [[word:lashashasha|lashashasha]] || [[word:lashasha|lashasha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:lashashafath|lashashafath]] || [[word:lashashafaj|lashashafaj]] || [[word:lashashafash|lashashafash]] || [[word:lashashaf|lashashaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:lashashasha|lashashasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:golashashasha|golashashasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokilashashasha|gokilashashasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:lashashnüsha|lashashnüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:golashashnknüsha|golashashnknüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokilashashnüsha|gokilashashnüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:lashashshësha|lashashshësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:golashashnkshësha|golashashnkshësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokilashashshësha|gokilashashshësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:lashashrosha|lashashrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:golashashnkrosha|golashashnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokilashashrosha|gokilashashrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:lashashmusha|lashashmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:golashashnkmusha|golashashnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokilashashmusha|gokilashashmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:lashashsherasha|lashashsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:golashashnksherasha|golashashnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokilashashsherasha|gokilashashsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:lashashngasha|lashashngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:golashashnkngasha|golashashnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokilashashngasha|gokilashashngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:lashashyasha|lashashyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:golashashnkyasha|golashashnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokilashashyasha|gokilashashyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:lashashyamasha|lashashyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:golashashnkyamasha|golashashnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokilashashyamasha|gokilashashyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:lashashnüshësha|lashashnüshësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:golashashnknüshësha|golashashnknüshësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokilashashnüshësha|gokilashashnüshësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:lashashnürosha|lashashnürosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:golashashnknürosha|golashashnknürosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokilashashnürosha|gokilashashnürosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:lashashnümusha|lashashnümusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:golashashnknümusha|golashashnknümusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokilashashnümusha|gokilashashnümusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:lashashshënüsha|lashashshënüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:golashashnkshënüsha|golashashnkshënüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokilashashshënüsha|gokilashashshënüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:lashashshërosha|lashashshërosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:golashashnkshërosha|golashashnkshërosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokilashashshërosha|gokilashashshërosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:lashashshëmusha|lashashshëmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:golashashnkshëmusha|golashashnkshëmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokilashashshëmusha|gokilashashshëmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:lashashronüsha|lashashronüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:golashashnkronüsha|golashashnkronüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokilashashronüsha|gokilashashronüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:lashashroshësha|lashashroshësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:golashashnkroshësha|golashashnkroshësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokilashashroshësha|gokilashashroshësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:lashashromusha|lashashromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:golashashnkromusha|golashashnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokilashashromusha|gokilashashromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:lashashmunüsha|lashashmunüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:golashashnkmunüsha|golashashnkmunüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokilashashmunüsha|gokilashashmunüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:lashashmushësha|lashashmushësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:golashashnkmushësha|golashashnkmushësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokilashashmushësha|gokilashashmushësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:lashashmurosha|lashashmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:golashashnkmurosha|golashashnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokilashashmurosha|gokilashashmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:lashash|lashash]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:læshæsh|læshæsh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:holashash|holashash]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:holæshæsh|holæshæsh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hoholashash|hoholashash]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hoholæshæsh|hoholæshæsh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:nülashash|nülashash]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nülæshæsh|nülæshæsh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nünülashash|nünülashash]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nünülæshæsh|nünülæshæsh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:nïlashash|nïlashash]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nïlæshæsh|nïlæshæsh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nïnïlashash|nïnïlashash]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nïnïlæshæsh|nïnïlæshæsh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:lulashash|lulashash]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lulæshæsh|lulæshæsh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lululashash|lululashash]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lululæshæsh|lululæshæsh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:lilashash|lilashash]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lilæshæsh|lilæshæsh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lililashash|lililashash]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lililæshæsh|lililæshæsh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kolashash|kolashash]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kolæshæsh|kolæshæsh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokolashash|kokolashash]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokolæshæsh|kokolæshæsh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kelashash|kelashash]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kelæshæsh|kelæshæsh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekelashash|kekelashash]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekelæshæsh|kekelæshæsh]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5db7a01}}
